title: Mob Collections
description: A mod that adds figures, collectables, and more based on mobs, youtubers, vtubers, and more!
body:
This mod adds several figures and other collectibles based on mobs, youtubers, vtubers, and more!

It adds: Several figures, (some) can be found in loot and others can be crafted. 
         It adds paintings.
         It adds food.
         2 villager professions, the sculpter and collector. 
         The sculpter's workstation is the figure table, the collectors workstation is the collectors bag.
         It adds armor trims and colors.
         It also adds advancements.

and thats about it.

The mod is made with mcreator and is very WIP at the moment and will get updates over time.

Oh yea, before i forget, if you wanna give suggestions, you can dm me at coolvile6 on discord!

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-collections](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-collections) - curseforge download link
